prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger** (84mm compressor wheel) for the **CA4GC20TD-30** 2.0L turbocharged inline-4 engine, paired with a **PTP Turbo Blanket** and **Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate** to handle the stock fuel system's 200-bar high-pressure direct injection limits while targeting 450whp on **E85 fuel** with a **Syvecs S8 Plug & Play ECU** for precise boost control and ignition timing.

Install a **Wagner Tuning Competition Intercooler Kit (FMIC)** with a 60mm core thickness and **Mishimoto silicone hoses** to reduce intake temps under sustained boost, critical for the H9's front-mounted radiator layout, while integrating a **Perrin Performance 3-core aluminum oil cooler** to manage the CA4GC20TD-30's 10.5:1 compression ratio under high load.

Replace the stock **ZF 8HP70 8-speed automatic transmission** with a **Porsche 991.2 PDK 8-speed dual-clutch unit** (modified via **Tremec TR-9070 adapter plate**) for faster shifts, paired with a **South Bend Clutch Stage 3 Daily** and **Quaife ATB differential** to handle the increased torque, while reinforcing the subframe with **034 Motorsport billet aluminum motor mounts** to prevent drivetrain deflection.
estetica: Fit a **Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody kit** (H9-specific, 50mm rear fender flares) with **custom carbon fiber side skirts** and a **Vorsteiner V-FF 103 front splitter** (reinforced with **AeroCatch quick-release mounts**) to match the H9's 1,925mm width while improving downforce via a **Rocket Bunny GT-style duckbill rear wing** (3D-printed carbon fiber, adjustable angle).

Replace the stock **LED matrix headlights** with **Morimoto XB LED Projector Retrofit Kit** (HID-compatible, 5500K color temp) and **Lux H8 Angel Eyes** (RGBW, 1200-lumen output), while integrating **OEM-style sequential turn signals** (via **VLEDS 7444-7440 HyperFlash LEDs**) and a **custom laser-cut Hongqi emblem** (anodized red, backlit with **Philips Ultinon Pro9000 LEDs**).

Install **Rotiform LAS-R 20x9.5 ET35 front / 20x11 ET40 rear wheels** (staggered, 5x114.3 PCD) with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/30/20 front, 295/25/20 rear)** for optimal grip, paired with **AP Racing Radi-CAL 6-piston front / 4-piston rear big brake kit** (380mm front rotors, 356mm rear) and **Project Mu HC+ brake pads** for fade resistance during track use.
